name: White Chocolate-Coconut Truffles
recipeIngredient: 1 large egg yolk at room temperature
2 tablespoons coconut liqueur or light rum
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heatproof bowl over very hot water.
2. Add the white chocolate and melt, stirring occasionally, until smooth.
3. Remove from the heat and whisk in 1/4 cup of the shredded coconut, the egg yolk, coconut liqueur, and vanilla. The mixture may separate; keep whisking until it comes together.
4. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and refrigerate until firm, at least 3 hours or overnight.
5. Using a melon baller, scoop up the mixture and roll into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll each ball in the remaining shredded coconut, pressing gently so it adheres.
7. Refrigerate until ready to serve. (The truffles can be prepared up to 3 days ahead, tightly covered, and refrigerated, or frozen for up to 1 month.)
